name: Dog Bed King USA Cuddler Bolster Dog Bed w/Removable Cover
description: Your furry friend is going to feel like royalty sleeping in Dog Bed King USA Cuddler Dog Bed! This cozy bed is crafted with a solid foam material that contours to your dog’s body for comfort and support. The faux-sheepskin interior will make your canine feel extra relaxed during an afternoon snooze or long night’s sleep. And the front is lower, making it easy for smaller pups and older dogs to climb in. Best of all, the elastic-trimmed cover comes off for easy cleaning!
